Categories.value: Eva Rinaldi|Flickr images reviewed by FlickreviewR 2|Files from Eva Rinaldi Flickr stream|Tony Anthony Rinaldi

ImageDescription.value:
Eva Rinaldi (16 November 1971 is an Australian Artist painter and costume designer.

Biography

Eva Rinaldi formally known as Eva Yvette Cantali was born in Camperdown Sydney Australia; she became an actor in 1994 and played the role of Julie in Heartbreak High in 1996. <a href="https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0108800/characters/nm7097918" rel="noreferrer nofollow">www.imdb.com/title/tt0108800/characters/nm7097918</a> She became an artist in 1997 winning local art competitions such as Chalk the walk in 2005 and Sydney City Rotaract Club “ hidden treasures (sailing opera house)

She then married Tony Anthony Rinaldi, separated, and became a photographer, offering celebrity photography working alongside fashion celebrities such as Akira Isogawa, <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Akira_Isogawa" rel="noreferrer nofollow">en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Akira_Isogawa</a> Carla Zampatti <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carla_Zampatti" rel="noreferrer nofollow">en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carla_Zampatti</a> Collette Dinnigan <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Collette_Dinnigan" rel="noreferrer nofollow">en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Collette_Dinnigan</a> <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gillian_Armstrong#/media/File:Gillian_Armstrong.jpg" rel="noreferrer nofollow">en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gillian_Armstrong#/media/File:Gilli...</a> some references can also be found here: <a href="File:Collette_Dinnigan_-_Flickr_-_Eva_Rinaldi_Celebrity_and_Live_Music_Photographer.jpg" rel="noreferrer nofollow">commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Collette_Dinnigan_-_Flick...</a>

<a href="File:Jack_Thompson_-_Flickr_-_Eva_Rinaldi_Celebrity_and_Live_Music_Photographer.jpg" rel="noreferrer nofollow">commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Jack_Thompson_-_Flickr_-_...</a>

<a href="https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Russell_Crowe_-_Flickr_-_Eva_Rinaldi_Celebrity_and_Live_Music_Photographer_" rel="noreferrer nofollow">commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Russell_Crowe_-_Flickr_-_...</a>(2).jpg

<a href="https://sco.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Rupert_Murdoch_-_Flickr_-_Eva_Rinaldi_Celebrity_and_Live_Music_Photographer.jpg" rel="noreferrer nofollow">sco.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Rupert_Murdoch_-_Flickr_-_Eva...</a>

<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Eva_Rinaldi_Arthur_Premier_" rel="noreferrer nofollow">en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Eva_Rinaldi_Arthur_Premier_</a>(5621600417).jpg


<a href="https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Jacki_Weaver_-_Flickr_-_Eva_Rinaldi_Celebrity_and_Live_Music_Photographer_" rel="noreferrer nofollow">commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Jacki_Weaver_-_Flickr_-_E...</a>(1).jpg


Eva was a teacher of makeup and body painting at the Parramatta College and was also involved in a variety of charitable activities working with students with mental disabilities.. Eva Rinaldi then ran an artist agency company with her son Joseph Rinaldi called Human Statue Body art.

<a href="https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Category:Eva_Rinaldi" rel="noreferrer nofollow">commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Category:Eva_Rinaldi</a>

<a href="https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:George_Miller_and_Eva_Rinaldi_at_the_Baby_Driver_Premiere_" rel="noreferrer nofollow">commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:George_Miller_and_Eva_Rin...</a>(35835091376).jpg

BORN


Eva Rinaldi 16 November 1971 Camperdown Sydney Australia


Other names Yvette Cantali, Eva Cantali Occupation Australian Artist, Photographer Spouse(s) Tony Anthony Rinaldi Divorced in 2006

Children Joseph Anthony Rinaldi

Credit.value: Eva Rinaldi, Tony Anthony Rinaldi

Artist.value: Eva Rinaldi from Abbotsford, Australia

92527692.title: File:Nuclear and solar energy implications for homeland security (IA nuclearndsolaren109453733).pdf

ObjectName.value: Nuclear and solar energy implications for homeland security

Categories.value: PD US Government|FEDLINK - United States Federal Collection|Scans from the Internet Archive/unverified|CC-PD-Mark|Scans from the Internet Archive|Books uploaded by Fæ|Books without Wikidata item|Documents related to climate change

ImageDescription.value:
In the eyes of many experts, the world is moving away from oil as a cheap energy source. As this future unfolds, the United States may perform a leading role as the planet's premier energy consumer. Solar and nuclear power provide possibilities for this future which represent the extremes in terms of energy supply. The question this thesis asks is: what are the security implications of a substantial shift in energy policy in either a solar or nuclear direction? The analysis begins with a question, \"What is a substantial shift?\", and defines substantial in terms of energy shortage, energy independence, and climate change. The proposed energy futures to match these shifts are then judged with respect to three security criteria: resource access, nuclear weapons proliferation, and infrastructure protection. Accepting many uncertainties with future economic and technical solutions (even as proven systems are proposed), solar power provides the most stable future in terms of security alone. However, because these options are not mutually exclusive, both cases offer security challenges which are addressed in the concluding recommendations.


Subjects: Energy consumption; National security; Nuclear energy; Solar energy

Credit.value:
Internet Archive identifier: nuclearndsolaren109453733
https://archive.org/download/nuclearndsolaren109453733/nuclearndsolaren109453733.pdf
